event: Winter scene on the Obvodny Canal in St. Petersburg
description: A somber winter scene showing the Obvodny Canal in St. Petersburg. Snow covers the ground and buildings. A large dark barge is moored in the partially frozen canal. Several small figures pull or push something along the embankment. Classical-style buildings with snow-covered roofs line both sides. The sky is gray and overcast. The palette is muted with greens, grays, browns, and white, rendered in a graphic style with visible hatching lines, characteristic of Dobuzhinsky's urban views.
